message:
fix: cross-platform compatibility and compilation fixes

- Gate process module with #[cfg(unix)]
- Gate tests using Unix-only fd APIs with #[cfg(all(test, unix))]
- Fix undefined duration_held variable in obligation.rs
- Fix borrow-after-move in region.rs begin_close
- Add FromRawFd import in io_uring.rs
- Implement Debug manually for IoUringReactor
- Simplify PushError handling for io_uring API compatibility

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
